title: Organic Maps
author: tosh
aiHeadline: Forget Google Maps—now you can get lost with Organic Maps, because nothing says 'directions' like a healthy dose of confusion!

title: OpenPrinter
author: bouh
aiHeadline: Tired of your printer working perfectly? OpenPrinter is here to make your printing experience as frustrating as possible, one open-source glitch at a time!

title: EU Council forces Chat Control via fast-track
author: stavros
aiHeadline: The EU Council is taking privacy to the next level by forcing Chat Control via fast-track—because nothing says 'trust us' like a government that scans your messages before you even hit send!

title: It's not about physical vs. digital games, it's about ownership
author: popcar2
aiHeadline: Forget the debate between physical and digital games—what really matters is who owns the pixels, because apparently, that's the new frontier in ownership disputes!

title: Introduction to Compilers and Language Design (2021)
author: AlexeyBrin
aiHeadline: If you've ever wondered how your code turns into magic, this introduction to compilers and language design will explain it all—except why your code still doesn't work after compiling!
